name: She Fighter
overview: The first martial arts experience-based reality show, with Zhang Yuqi as the curator, and Hard Candy Girl 303, Qin Xiaoxian, and Dong Youlin jointly run a YoungChun Martial Arts Hall in Shanghai. They learn the art of Yong Chun and also act as workers that operate the daily in and outs of the martial arts hall.

trailers.title: 《姐姐妹妹的武馆 She Fighter》完整版第8期：收官！硬糖少女秦霄贤嗨跳团舞
